text.div:
Generated Narrative: ImplementationGuide hl7.fhir.us.pacio-pfe

PACIOPersonalFunctioningAndEngagementImplementationGuide

The official URL for this implementation guide is: 

http://hl7.org/fhir/us/pacio-pfe/ImplementationGuide/hl7.fhir.us.pacio-pfe

FHIR Implementation Guide to exchange assessments of and data on a person's functioning, including body functions, activities, and participation, between post-acute care (PAC) and other providers, patients, and key stakeholders

name: PACIOPersonalFunctioningAndEngagementImplementationGuide
title: PACIO Personal Functioning and Engagement Implementation Guide
description: FHIR Implementation Guide to exchange assessments of and data on a person's functioning, including body functions, activities, and participation, between post-acute care (PAC) and other providers, patients, and key stakeholders

extension.valueMarkdown: Automatically added as a dependency - all IGs depend on HL7 Terminology
Automatically added as a dependency - all IGs depend on the HL7 Extension Pack

resource.name: AssistanceRequired
resource.description: Associated with the Narrative History of Status profile to provide a high-level indication of assistance required for the person's baseline ability (status immediately preceding the current admission, illness, or exacerbation for a patient). The CMS Assessment answer list LL4309-2 provides possible values for this extension.

resource.name: Condition-bodySite
resource.description: Select Conditions with the specified BodySite

resource.name: Condition-code
resource.description: Select Conditions with the specified code

resource.name: Condition-identifier
resource.description: Select Conditions with the specified identifier

resource.name: Condition-recordedDate
resource.description: Select Conditions with the specified recordedDate

resource.name: DevicePatientUsed
resource.description: Associated with the PAC Collection profile to point to a record indicating what healthcare-related assistive device was used by a patient during an observation. This extension leverages the DeviceUseStatement resource instead of Device resource so as to indicate appropriately a record of assistive device usage by a patient.

resource.name: Goal-achievementStatus
resource.description: Select Goals with the specified achievementStatus

resource.name: Goal-addresses
resource.description: Select Goals with the specified addresses

resource.name: Goal-identifier
resource.description: Select Goals with the specified identifier

resource.name: NutritionOrder-encounter
resource.description: Select NutritionOrders with the specified encounter

resource.name: NutritionOrder-identifier
resource.description: Select NutritionOrders with the specified identifier

resource.name: NutritionOrder-orderer
resource.description: Select NutritionOrders with the specified orderer

resource.name: NutritionOrder-subject
resource.description: Select NutritionOrders with the specified subject

resource.name: ObservationEventLocation
resource.description: This extension is used to indicate the principal physical location where an observation event occurred.

resource.name: Personal Functioning and Engagement Abstract Observation
resource.description: An abstract profile representing the cross-cutting requirements for Personal Functioning and Engagement Observation instances. This profile is not intended to be used directly. Implementers should use specific profiles that layer these requirements on top of specific US Core Observation profiles.

resource.name: Personal Functioning and Engagement Body Structures Value Set
resource.description: This value set includes LOINC codes that represent patient observations regarding individual's body structures.

resource.name: Personal Functioning and Engagement Capability Statement
resource.description: This Capability Statement defines the expected capabilities of a Personal Functioning and Engagement FHIR server conforming to the Personal Functioning and Engagement Implementation Guide.

resource.name: Personal Functioning and Engagement Category
resource.description: Includes codes representing health and health-related domains into which functioning observations can be further categorized.

resource.name: Personal Functioning and Engagement Category Value Set
resource.description: This value set includes codes representing health and health-related domains into which functioning observations can be further categorized.

resource.name: Personal Functioning and Engagement Clinical Test Observation
resource.description: An exchange of post-acute care observation for a patient. This profile is used for exchanging a single piece of observation data that resulted from a clinical test.

resource.name: Personal Functioning and Engagement Collection
resource.description: A point in time collection of post-acute care observations for a patient. This profile is used for exchanging a set of observation data collected through the use of a structured resource (e.g., assessment tool, instrument, or screen) with multiple questions.

resource.name: Personal Functioning and Engagement Communication Value Set
resource.description: This value set includes LOINC codes that represent patient observations regarding individual's communication.

resource.name: Personal Functioning and Engagement Condition Encounter Diagnosis Profile
resource.description: An exchange of post-acute care condition encounter diagnosis for a patient. This profile is used for exchanging a condition encounter diagnosis.

resource.name: Personal Functioning and Engagement Condition Problems and Health Concerns Profile
resource.description: An exchange of post-acute care condition, problem, or health concern for a patient. This profile is used for exchanging a problem list item or a health concern.

resource.name: Personal Functioning and Engagement Diagnostic Report Note Exchange Profile
resource.description: An exchange of post-acute care diagonistic report notes for a patient. This profile is used for exchanging diagnostic report notes, as opposed to laboratory notes.

resource.name: Personal Functioning and Engagement Domestic Life Value Set
resource.description: This value set includes LOINC codes that represent patient observations regarding individual's domestic life.

resource.name: Personal Functioning and Engagement Example Observations Value Set
resource.description: This value set includes LOINC codes that provide examples of observations within the scope of the Personal Functioning and Engagement IG.

resource.name: Personal Functioning and Engagement Functioning Category Code System
resource.description: Defines a specific code for the classification of patient observations regarding individual's functioning and engagement.

resource.name: Personal Functioning and Engagement Functions Of Digestive, Metabolic, and Endocrine Systems Value Set
resource.description: This value set includes LOINC codes that represent patient observations regarding individual's digestive, metabolic, and endocrine systems functioning.

resource.name: Personal Functioning and Engagement Functions of Skin and Related Structures Value Set
resource.description: This value set includes LOINC codes that represent patient observations regarding individual's skin and related structures functioning.

resource.name: Personal Functioning and Engagement Genitourinary and Reproductive Functions Value Set
resource.description: This value set includes LOINC codes that represent patient observations regarding individual's genitourinary and reproductive functioning.

resource.name: Personal Functioning and Engagement Goal Profile
resource.description: An exchange of post-acute care goal for a patient. This profile is used for exchanging a personal functioning and engagement goal.

resource.name: Personal Functioning and Engagement Goals Mobility Value Set
resource.description: This value set includes LOINC codes that represent patient goals regarding individual's mobility.

resource.name: Personal Functioning and Engagement Goals Panel Value Set
resource.description: This value set includes LOINC panel codes that are goals represent headers and sub-headers in CMS assessments and are tied to PFE collections.

resource.name: Personal Functioning and Engagement Goals Self-Care Value Set
resource.description: This value set includes LOINC codes that represent patient goals regarding individual's ability to perform self-care.

resource.name: Personal Functioning and Engagement Learning and Applying Knowledge Value Set
resource.description: This value set includes LOINC codes that represent patient observations regarding individual's ability to learn and apply knowledge.

resource.name: Personal Functioning and Engagement Mental Functions Value Set
resource.description: This value set includes LOINC codes that represent patient observations regarding individual's mental functioning.

resource.name: Personal Functioning and Engagement Mobility Value Set
resource.description: This value set includes LOINC codes that represent patient observations regarding individual's mobility.

resource.name: Personal Functioning and Engagement Narrative History of Status
resource.description: An exchange of a narrative summary regarding the most recent prior status immediately preceding the current admission, illness, or exacerbation for a patient. The use of this profile is encouraged in the absence of formal prior level assessments. For formal assessments conducted with for example, an assessment instrument, use the [collection](StructureDefinition-pfe-collection.html) and [single observation](StructureDefinition-pfe-observation-single.html) profiles defined in this IG to capture assessment data.

resource.name: Personal Functioning and Engagement Neuromusculoskeletal and Movement Related Functions Value Set
resource.description: This value set includes LOINC codes that represent patient observations regarding individual's neuromusculoskeletal and movement related functioning.

resource.name: Personal Functioning and Engagement Nutrition Order Profile
resource.description: An exchange of post-acute care nutrition order for a patient. This profile is used for exchanging a personal functioning and engagement nutrition order for oral diet, supplement, or enteral formula.

resource.name: Personal Functioning and Engagement Panel Value Set
resource.description: This value set includes LOINC panel codes that represent headers and sub-headers in CMS assessments and are tied to PFE collections.

resource.name: Personal Functioning and Engagement Products and Technology Value Set
resource.description: This value set includes LOINC codes that represent patient observations regarding the products and technology that affect their lives.

resource.name: Personal Functioning and Engagement Self-Care Value Set
resource.description: This value set includes LOINC codes that represent patient observations regarding individual's ability to perform self-care.

resource.name: Personal Functioning and Engagement Sensory Functions and Pain Clinical Test Value Set
resource.description: This value set includes LOINC codes that represent clinicl test observations regarding individual's sensory functioning and pain.

resource.name: Personal Functioning and Engagement Sensory Functions and Pain Value Set
resource.description: This value set includes LOINC codes that represent patient observations regarding individual's sensory functioning and pain.

resource.name: Personal Functioning and Engagement Service Request Profile
resource.description: An exchange of post-acute care service request for a patient. This profile is used for exchanging service requests.

resource.name: Personal Functioning and Engagement Single Observation
resource.description: An exchange of post-acute care observation for a patient. This profile is used for exchanging an observation for a single question generally included in a structured resource (e.g., assessment tool, instrument, or screen).

resource.name: Personal Functioning and Engagement Structures Involved in Voice and Speech Value Set
resource.description: This value set includes LOINC codes that represent patient observations regarding individual's structures involved in voice and speech.

resource.name: Personal Functioning and Engagement Survey Value Set
resource.description: Used to indicate that all PFE observations of of type Survey

resource.name: Personal Functioning and Engagement US Core Value Set
resource.description: Subset of the us core categories to identify the type of PFE observation

resource.name: Personal Functioning and Engagement Use of Device
resource.description: A record of an assistive device (e.g., eyeglasses or hearing aid) being used by a patient during a post-acute care observation. This profile based on the DeviceUseStatement resource provides a way to include information about device usage during an assessment.

resource.name: Personal Functioning and Engagement Voice and Speech Functions Value Set
resource.description: This value set includes LOINC codes that represent patient observations regarding individual's voice and speech functioning.

resource.name: PFEIG-AllergyACE
resource.description: Example Allergy Intolerance for angiotensin-converting enzyme inhibitor mechanism of action.
